We had a word in our family for the feeling of coming home after a long time away. I have not found it in any other language.
setup

I agreed to something I should not have agreed to because I did not know how to say no to that person. I regretted it immediately and for a long time after.

There was a period when I did not know who I was supposed to be anymore. Everything I had built my sense of myself around had changed.
tension

My father came to see where I lived for the first time. He stood in the doorway looking around without saying anything. Then he nodded.
